title: The Fourth Dimension Explained by an Apple!

scenes.text: An apple was used to illustrate the concept of the fourth dimension!
Carl Sagan famously used this example to explain complex spacetime ideas.
The sliced apple shows how our perception of reality can be limited.
This analogy reveals the deeper nature of dimensions and reality.
scenes.label: DIMENSIONS EXPLAINED

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Carl Sagan used an apple to vividly explain the fourth dimension, revealing how our perception might be limited. Follow for daily science!
